subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is worthy and befitting, Who hath nourished and preserved physical bodies through the waters of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقتدیرا لایق و سزاست که از ماء عالم اجساد را تربیت نموده و حفظ
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
